title: scutellaria regeliana
intro: Scutellaria regeliana, also known as Baikal skullcap, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Baikal skullcap include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and protecting against neurodegenerative diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Baikal skullcap can be consumed as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used topically in creams and salves for skin conditions.
